name: core.openwop.hitl
description: Human-in-the-loop primitives. form-request, approval-request, ask-user — each suspends the run via the existing interrupt mechanism. Zero npm deps.
author: OpenWOP Working Group

nodes.label: HITL Form
nodes.description: Suspend on a typed JSON-Schema form. Constraint: flat schema (string/number/boolean/enum, formats email/uri/date/date-time) — mirrors MCP elicitation.

nodes.label: HITL Approval
nodes.description: Suspend on a binary approve / reject choice with optional comment. Honors quorum if the host advertises it.

nodes.label: HITL Ask User
nodes.description: Suspend on a free-text chat question. Used inside chat-driven workflows.
